- [ ] 🎨 Code style update (formatting, renaming) / 代码样式更新
- [ ] ♻️ Code refactoring (no functional changes) / 代码重构
- [ ] ⚡ Performance improvement / 性能优化
- [ ] 🧪 Test update / 测试更新
- [ ] 🔧 Build/CI changes / 构建/CI更改

## Checklist / 检查清单

<!-- Please check the relevant option(s) -->
<!-- 请勾选相关选项 -->

- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines / 我的代码遵循项目的样式指南
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code / 我已经对自己的代码进行了自我审查
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas / 我已经对代码进行了注释，特别是在难以理解的地方
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation / 我已经对文档进行了相应的更改
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings / 我的更改不会产生新的警告
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works / 我已经添加了测试来证明我的修复是有效的或我的功能是有效的
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes / 新的和现有的单元测试在本地与我的更改一起通过
